name: XAI Octagon Floating Rate & Alternative Income Trust
subtype: closed-end floating-rate and CLO income fund
riskRewardJob: highest bridge income / highest structure and credit complexity
whatItOwns: Floating-rate credit and structured credit exposure, including CLO-linked risk.
whatPaysIt: Portfolio income distributed through a leveraged closed-end fund structure.
whatHurtsIt: Distribution cuts, NAV deterioration, leverage stress, discount widening, CLO stress, liquidity weakness.
failureMode: Income advantage fails if NAV, distribution survival, liquidity, or thesis integrity deteriorates.
shockFamily: CEF / CLO / leveraged floating-rate credit cluster
distributionStyle: issuer distribution rate / live check required
dripRelevance: cash distributions must flow into |M|; no broker auto-DRIP
whySelected: Bridge-mode high-output [G] accelerator with explicit XFLT permission gate.
whyNotOtherBucket: Not Blue because it is not a low-volatility anchor.
doctrineNotes: Allowed only in bridge mode when XFLT-specific price, NAV, premium/discount, distribution, leverage, liquidity, dates, and thesis gates are visible.
provenanceNotes: Static bridge record from revised Pre-Wave-I Manual D3 Bridge Paper. Live refresh required before execution.

evidenceLinks.ref: WaveRider Pre-Wave-I Manual D3 Bridge Paper - Revised

name: State Street Blackstone Senior Loan ETF
whatHurtsIt: Loan defaults, credit spread widening, liquidity stress, distribution yield deterioration.
failureMode: Loan market stress weakens income and price stability.
dripRelevance: cash distributions into |M| for manual D3 deployment
whyNotOtherBucket: Not Blue because it belongs to the Green income engine in this paper.
doctrineNotes: Watch loan defaults, credit spreads, liquidity, and distribution yield trend.
provenanceNotes: Static bridge record from revised Pre-Wave-I Manual D3 Bridge Paper. Live refresh required before execution.

name: PIMCO Enhanced Short Maturity Active ETF
riskRewardJob: lowest bridge payout inside Blue / higher liquidity intent
whatHurtsIt: Liquidity needs, share-price instability, credit spread movement, same-day cash availability constraints.
failureMode: Fails its bridge role if treated as the |M| wallet or if cash needs same-day availability.
selectorLabel: MINT ETF - PIMCO Enhanced Short Maturity Active ETF
dripRelevance: cash distributions into |M| for manual D3 deployment
whySelected: Bridge-mode [B] short-duration cash proxy. This is ticker MINT, not the |M| wallet.
whyNotOtherBucket: Not |M| because MINT ETF is a security and |M| is the staging wallet.
doctrineNotes: UI must label this as MINT ETF; no bare Mint label.
